CustomField.formula: IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BLC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "BY"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBUS"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBFR"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GBCH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "GCH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HBC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "HYS"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "KNO"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "MA"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "ON"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SC"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "SE"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "VH"),1,0) + IF(INCLUDES( UnitRelevance__c , "XB"),1,0)
CustomField.label: ZCountUnitRelevance
